title: Data Engineering Job-Ready Bootcamp
subtitle: Master Data Pipelines, Snowflake, Airflow & Production Systems
description: Master data pipelines, Snowflake, Airflow & real-world systems. Become a job-ready Data Engineer by building end-to-end pipelines.

projects.title: API → Snowflake Pipeline
projects.description: Extract live weather/eCommerce data from API and load to Snowflake.

projects.title: Data Warehouse Design
projects.description: Build a complete Star Schema and OLAP structures.

projects.title: Automated Workflows
projects.description: Automate pipeline execution using Apache Airflow orchestrator.

projects.title: Capstone Pipeline
projects.description: End-to-end production data pipeline with testing and monitoring.

requirements: Basic Python and intermediate SQL knowledge
Willingness to build complex data structures
Computer setup capable of running docker

curriculum.title: Data Extraction & SQL pipelines

lessons.title: Python for Data Pipelines: API requests & pagination
Advanced SQL: CTEs, analytical window functions & transformations

curriculum.practice: Create a python script to pull eCommerce sales and clean raw values
curriculum.outcome: Can extract raw dataset from remote REST APIs and execute SQL transformations.

curriculum.title: Snowflake Data Warehousing

lessons.title: Snowflake Architecture: Virtual warehouses & Storage layers
Loading data using Snowpipe, COPY INTO & staging layers

curriculum.practice: Design and load structured business data into active Snowflake staging
curriculum.outcome: Design database warehousing structures and manage bulk cloud data loads.

curriculum.title: Orchestration with Airflow & Capstone

lessons.title: Apache Airflow: DAGs, Operators, Tasks & scheduling
Data transformation modeling using dbt (Data Build Tool)
Completing and presenting end-to-end Pipeline Capstone project

curriculum.practice: Design Apache Airflow orchestrator DAG executing staging load
curriculum.outcome: Job-ready Data Engineer capable of orchestrating complex production pipelines.

features: End-to-end data pipeline training from scratch
Real tools used in top industries (Snowflake, Apache Airflow, dbt)
Production-style projects that you can showcase on GitHub
Includes direct training for Data Engineer, Analytics Engineer, ETL Developer roles
